enriched_points.expanded_content: Effective integration of cancer genomics requires collaboration among clinicians, nurses, and researchers to enhance understanding and application of genomic findings in patient care.
Genomic testing is critical for personalized treatment. High-throughput sequencing helps identify specific mutations, guiding tailored therapeutic approaches for individual cancer patients.
Continuous monitoring of treatment responses through genomic data allows for timely adjustments to therapy, optimizing outcomes and minimizing adverse effects in cancer patients.
